goal: Unify card catalog faction/type/rarity semantics for the full 16-faction view, keep Legalist cards grouped together, and remove remaining English copy in card presentation UI.
constraints: Keep total card corpus baseline unchanged and do not reduce below runtime gate requirements.
Do not change gameplay mechanics; this task is data normalization and display grouping only.
Preserve existing component structure and route flow while improving card catalog consistency.
deliverables: Card source normalization for faction/type/rarity values into consistent Chinese presentation values.
Stable 16-faction display order with Legalist cards grouped under one faction heading in card grid.
Card-facing UI text updated to Chinese where English placeholders currently appear.
